summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for Phase 2 Tournaments module. All critical flows tested and working: login -> home with TORNEI section -> browse tournaments -> tournament detail -> registration -> my tournaments. Side menu with tournament links verified. Backend API tests also run (29/29 passed).

issues: Minor: data-testid attributes for menu items use 'testID' which doesn't render as data-testid in React Native Web - use position-based clicking instead

critical_code_review_comments: All tournament screens are well-implemented with proper data fetching and error handling
Registration flow correctly updates UI state after API call success
Browse tournaments shows all available tournaments with proper status badges
Tournament detail page correctly displays info tab with all required fields (participants, structure, advancement rules, duration, entry fee)
My tournaments correctly filters to show only user's registered tournaments
Home page TORNEI DISPONIBILI section shows open tournaments with registration CTA
Side menu correctly shows TORNEI section with 'I miei tornei' and 'Iscriviti a nuovi tornei' links
seed_data_creation: User ilio@raimondi.it was registered to tournament TEST_RegFlow_56e2733f during testing. Also registered to 'Torneo Primavera 2026'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Tournament frontend is complete. All screens working: browse-tournaments, my-tournaments, tournament detail [id].tsx. Home page shows TORNEI DISPONIBILI section with open tournaments. Side menu has TORNEI section with links to tournament pages. Registration flow tested and working - clicking 'Iscriviti al torneo' button successfully registers user and shows 'Sei iscritto a questo torneo' confirmation.

tested_flows.home_page_tornei_section: PASS - TORNEI DISPONIBILI section visible with open tournaments and 'Iscriviti' buttons
tested_flows.side_menu_tornei: PASS - Side menu shows TORNEI section with 'I miei tornei' and 'Iscriviti a nuovi tornei' links
tested_flows.browse_tournaments: PASS - /menu/browse-tournaments shows list of available tournaments from /api/tournaments
tested_flows.tournament_detail: PASS - /tournament/[id] shows Info tab with participant count, structure, duration, registration info
tested_flows.registration: PASS - Clicking 'Iscriviti al torneo' button registers user and shows 'Sei iscritto a questo torneo' confirmation
tested_flows.my_tournaments: PASS - /menu/my-tournaments shows tournaments where user is registered
